mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM clinic_member WHERE deleted = 0
AND (patient_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR phone LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR level_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR card_no LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))

SELECT id, patient_id, card_no, patient_name, phone, member_type, level_name, total_consume, balance, total_stored, points, open_date, expire_date, status, created_at, updated_at, deleted FROM clinic_member WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0

SELECT id, patient_id, card_no, patient_name, phone, member_type, level_name, total_consume, balance, total_stored, points, open_date, expire_date, status, created_at, updated_at, deleted FROM clinic_member WHERE patient_id = #{patientId} AND deleted = 0 LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO clinic_member (patient_id, card_no, patient_name, phone, member_type, level_name, total_consume, balance, total_stored, points, open_date, expire_date, status, created_at, updated_at, deleted) VALUES (#{patientId}, #{cardNo}, #{patientName}, #{phone}, #{memberType}, #{levelName}, #{totalConsume}, #{balance}, #{totalStored}, #{points}, #{openDate}, #{expireDate}, #{status}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt}, #{deleted})
mapper.update:
UPDATE clinic_member
patient_id = #{patientId}, card_no = #{cardNo}, patient_name = #{patientName}, phone = #{phone}, member_type = #{memberType}, level_name = #{levelName}, total_consume = #{totalConsume}, balance = #{balance}, total_stored = #{totalStored}, points = #{points}, open_date = #{openDate}, expire_date = #{expireDate}, status = #{status}, updated_at = #{updatedAt}, deleted = #{deleted},
WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
